productTitle: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Pro Dome White
name: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Pro Dome White
title: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Pro Dome White

detailed_description.heading: Premium 4K Video
detailed_description.text: The UVC-G6 Pro Dome captures ultra-high-definition video in true 4K (3840 × 2160), using a large 1/1.2" CMOS image sensor that delivers sharp, detailed images even in challenging lighting conditions. Its motorized varifocal lens (5.9–13.8 mm, f/1.5–f/2.9) provides flexible framing: a wide angle of view (horizontal up to 113.8°, diagonal up to 134°) for broad area coverage or a zoomed-in view (horizontal ~45.5°, vertical ~25.8°) when you need detail. With support for up to 30 FPS, the camera delivers smooth motion capture, making it suitable for use in security, surveillance, or monitoring across retail, warehouse, office, and outdoor locations. Night vision is enabled by built-in adaptive IR LEDs and an IR-cut filter, providing reliable imaging even in low-light conditions. A powerful 2.36× optical zoom enhances versatility, letting you adjust focus without compromising quality. Together, these features make the G6 Pro Dome suitable for applications requiring high resolution, fine detail, and adaptable framing.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Outdoor Build
detailed_description.text: The UVC-G6 Pro Dome is engineered for demanding environments. Its weather-resistant housing with IP66 protection ensures reliable performance under rain, dust, and general outdoor exposure, while the IK10-rated vandal-resistant dome adds durability against impact or tampering. The enclosure, made from polycarbonate and aluminum alloy, withstands temperature ranges from –20 °C to +50 °C, making it suitable for diverse climates. Power is supplied via PoE+ (42.5–57 V DC), and maximum power consumption stays modest, ensuring energy-efficient operation. A single Gigabit Ethernet port (RJ45) provides stable, wired connectivity, which is critical for uninterrupted video streaming and data transfer. The dome design and included mounting options (ceiling or wall) allow flexible installation almost anywhere, whether indoors or outdoors. Together, these features deliver a durable, resilient camera tailored for professional-grade surveillance systems and long-term outdoor deployment.

detailed_description.heading: Smart Monitoring & Integration
detailed_description.text: The G6 Pro Dome leverages a robust Quad-core Arm® Cortex®-A53 processor and integrates with the full-featured platform for advanced surveillance workflows. It supports MicroSD card storage (slot available), allowing local video retention and reducing reliance on external storage. Built-in support for intelligent detections, such as people, vehicles, or motion events, enables automated alerts and smart event handling. The camera includes essential image-processing settings: configurable color, brightness, contrast, exposure, white balance, 2D/3D noise reduction, motion-based noise reduction, masking, text overlay, and HDR, giving administrators fine-grained control over image quality. Thanks to the PoE+ power delivery and a compact yet professional build, installation and integration into existing network infrastructure is straightforward. The G6 Pro Dome is ideal for enterprise-level video surveillance, campus security, retail monitoring, or any environment demanding reliable, high-resolution video with minimal maintenance.
